                                Medical Centre is a well-equipped multi-specialty
                                hospital, which caters to all specialties and super specialties. PMC is
                                a comprehensive secondary care facility with excellent round the
                                clock back up of Emergency, Critical Care, lab, ambulance and
                                pharmacy services. Pushpanjali offers world class care with compassion. Care that is
                                amply reflected to the world through the globally comparable
                                Medicare facilities at Pushpanjali and compassion that's inherent in
                                each and every consultant and staff member present there. Furgosen Ortho Specialist Patient testimonials "Exceptional Care and Professionalism" "I visited Pushpanjali Medical Centre for a routine check-up and was truly impressed by the efficiency and warmth of the staff. The doctors took time to explain every detail and made me feel completely at ease. Highly recommended for anyone looking for quality healthcare." "Highly Skilled Doctors with a Human Touch" "The team at Pushpanjali Medical Centre is not only medically proficient but also incredibly compassionate. From diagnosis to recovery, the support I received was beyond expectations. They treat you like family." "Clean, Modern Facilities and Prompt Service" "I was amazed by how clean and well-organized the centre is. All departments are well-coordinated, and I barely had to wait. The technology they use is top-notch, and the staff is extremely responsive." "Comprehensive Services Under One Roof" "I didn’t have to run around for different tests or specialists—everything was available right at Pushpanjali. The convenience, combined with expert care, makes it the best healthcare choice in the region." "Quick Diagnosis and Effective Treatment" "I came in with severe stomach pain and was diagnosed within minutes. The doctors at Pushpanjali Medical Centre were quick, precise, and extremely professional. Thanks to them, I was treated efficiently and recovered without complications." Neha Sharma Ghaziabad Ravi Mehta Delhi NCR Amit Khurana Noida Sameer Verma Indirapuram Sanjay Bhardwaj Vaishali Pushpanjali Medical Centre (A Unit of M M Health Care Limited) is recognised as a East Delhi renowned institution, not only providing outstanding care and treatment, but improving the outcomes for all.Setting The Standard,For High Quality Care Since 1989.
